历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for the science group were approximately 17598 → 18110 → 45828 → 25652 → 16494, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, there was a severe drop (45828, suspected gap), followed by a sharp recovery to 25652 in 2024, and further advancement to 16494 in 2025. The recent two years show a rapid recovery, with a baseline of approximately 16494 in 2025. The enrollment plan for the science group in Shaanxi Province: 5 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 4 in 2024, 4 in 2025, and 13 in 2026 for the physics category, a 225% increase compared to 2025. This significant expansion greatly alleviates competition pressure, and the ranking is expected to shift noticeably backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2025 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked approximately 180th, rising to about 177th in 2026, showing a slight increase and stable overall level. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the volleyball league home court controversy, but it ranks 18th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, indicating considerable attention for applications. No obvious gaps in admission files were observed. Sports science is the university's flagship discipline (A+ in the fifth round of evaluation), but the science enrollment majors are mainly data science and big data.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science and Big Data Technology belongs to the computer category (relatively hot), Rehabilitation Physical Therapy belongs to the medical technology category (relatively hot), and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2025, there were 172,468 physics category candidates in the province, increasing to 206,500 in 2026, an increase of about 19.7%, intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has a certain regional appeal for Shaanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16494, the significant 225% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan (greatly easing competition, shifting ranking backward), and the approximately 20% increase in physics category candidates in the province (intensifying competition, shifting ranking forward), the expansion far exceeds the candidate increase, so the overall ranking is expected to shift noticeably backward. At the same time, the university's 211 level and Beijing's regional appeal support the ranking. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 38261, with a range of 37761–38761.
